blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Add evidence for payment terms validation
Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the coverage of all specified payment terms.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for payment terms (Net-15, Net-30, upon completion). While the linked use case mentions that payment is scheduled Net-15, it does not provide sufficient evidence that all specified payment terms are implemented or covered in the system. The lack of comprehensive evidence regarding the other payment terms (Net-30 and upon completion) indicates a gap in requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence confirming coverage of all specified payment terms (Net-15, Net-30, upon completion).
